prompt: Audit the authentication implementation in this codebase and give me a graded report on how safe it is.

assertions.name: finds-alg-from-token
assertions.text: Report identifies that the verifier dispatches on the token's own alg header, including the alg:none bypass, in server/auth.js

assertions.name: finds-fallback-secret
assertions.text: Report identifies the hardcoded fallback signing secret 'taskboard-dev-secret-2024' in server/auth.js

assertions.name: finds-missing-exp-pass
assertions.text: Report identifies that a token with no exp claim passes verification (the payload.exp && guard) in server/auth.js

assertions.name: finds-localstorage-token
assertions.text: Report identifies the session token stored in localStorage in client/src/api.js

assertions.name: finds-long-ttl
assertions.text: Report flags the 24-hour access token TTL with no refresh mechanism

assertions.name: finds-clientside-logout
assertions.text: Report flags that logout performs no server-side revocation

assertions.name: grade-d-or-f
assertions.text: Overall grade is D or F (with-skill run only)

assertions.name: no-fabricated-evidence
assertions.text: Every file path cited in findings exists in the fixture
